offer: For construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month, inefficient tracking of equipment maintenance schedules causes project delays. We provide a streamlined scheduling service instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient tracking of equipment maintenance schedules
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Share insights on Indie Hackers about scheduling tools
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Engage in community forums for construction management
try_it: Let users try manual entry and reminder notifications for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer onboarding for the first 10 users
Share weekly progress in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Allow CSV import for existing maintenance data
Enable one-click export of maintenance reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
